questionHtml: List two functions of the structure labelled A.
markschemeHtml:
a. breathing «rate»

b. heart function

c. digestion/saliva production

d. swallowing reflex

e. coughing

f. vomiting

g. blood pressure

h. state of consciousness/sleep

Allow any two functions.

No ECF

[Max 2 Marks]
